results.title: Slice
results.overview: In a spooky small town, when a slew of pizza delivery boys are slain on the job, two daring survivors set out to catch the culprits behind the cryptic crime spree.

results.title: The Motor City Slice
results.overview: In this animated short, Tigers ace Jack Morris recalls the adventures of getting his team pizza after winning the 1984 World Series.

results.title: Slices of Vi
results.overview: Victor, an aimless womaniser seen as a burden by friends and family begins to experience disturbing hallucinations in the wake of a new romantic relationship with a man, Lionel. These apparitions become more visceral as the two become more emotionally attached until it all reaches a breaking point.

results.title: Love & Pizza: A Romance in Five Slices
results.original_title: Love & Pizza: A Romance in Five Slices
results.overview: A tale of love and obsession as told through the Domino's pizza tracker.  https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VulgCWtepNw
